🌊 FloodGate Research Demo

Explore the future of public comment campaigns. FloodGate demonstrates how AI can generate thousands of unique, authentic-seeming comments that share core arguments but vary dramatically in expression. This proof-of-concept tool shows why traditional form letter detection methods may soon become obsolete.

Try generating a few comments to see how different they can be while maintaining the same position. This is a research demonstration only—not for actual submission to government agencies.

Launch FloodGate Demo →

About This Tool

This browser provides AI-powered analysis of public comments submitted to federal regulations through Regulations.gov. Our system processes thousands of comments to identify key themes, concerns, and recommendations from the public.

Features:

  • Automatic theme discovery using hierarchical clustering
  • Structured comment summaries highlighting key positions and concerns
  • Entity recognition for organizations, regulations, and technical terms
  • Interactive browsing by theme, entity, or individual comment
  • Export capabilities for further analysis
